ast.name: error
ast.source: ACTION NEEDED: require('iconv-lite').extendNodeEncodings() is not supported in your version of Node
ast.target: 需要操作：您的 Node 版本不支持 require('iconv-lite').extendNodeEncodings()

ast.name: error
ast.source: See more info at https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Node-v4-compatibility
ast.target: 更多信息请参见 https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Node-v4-compatibility

ast.name: error
ast.source: Iconv-lite warning: decode()-ing strings is deprecated. Refer to https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Use-Buffers-when-decoding
ast.target: Iconv-lite 警告：使用 decode() 解码字符串已弃用。请参考 https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Use-Buffers-when-decoding

ast.name: error
ast.source: iconv-lite warning: javascript files use encoding different from utf-8. See https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Javascript-source-file-encodings for more info.
ast.target: iconv-lite 警告：javascript 文件使用的编码不是 utf-8。更多信息请参见 https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Javascript-source-file-encodings。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Notes: cannot use these two options "stripIgnoreTag" and "onIgnoreTag" at the same time
ast.target: 注意：不能同时使用 \"stripIgnoreTag\" 和 \"onIgnoreTag\" 这两个选项

ast.name: error
ast.source: An error was thrown from an 'onSchemaLoadOrUpdate' listener
ast.target: 从 'onSchemaLoadOrUpdate' 监听器抛出了一个错误

ast.name: info
ast.source: Apollo schema reporting: schema to report has been overridden
ast.target: Apollo 模式报告：要报告的模式已被覆盖

ast.name: info
ast.source: Enabling inline tracing for this federated service. To disable, use ApolloServerPluginInlineTraceDisabled.
ast.target: 为此联合服务启用内联跟踪。要禁用，请使用 ApolloServerPluginInlineTraceDisabled。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Using RetryOperation.try() is deprecated
ast.target: 使用 RetryOperation.try() 已弃用

ast.name: log
ast.source: Using RetryOperation.start() is deprecated
ast.target: 使用 RetryOperation.start() 已弃用

ast.name: log
ast.source: Stop graphql-server
ast.target: 停止 graphql-server

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Server Port
ast.target: 服务器端口

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The provided API key has unexpected leading or trailing whitespace. Apollo Server will trim the key value before use.
ast.target: 提供的 API 密钥存在意外的前导或尾随空格。Apollo Server 将在使用前修剪密钥值。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The 'includeRequest' async predicate function must return a boolean value.
ast.target: 'includeRequest' 异步谓词函数必须返回一个布尔值。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Persisted queries are enabled and are using an unbounded cache. Your server is vulnerable to denial of service attacks via memory exhaustion. Set `cache: "bounded"` or `persistedQueries: false` in your ApolloServer constructor, or see https://go.apollo.dev/s/cache-backends for other alternatives.
ast.target: 持久化查询已启用并使用无界缓存。您的服务器容易受到通过内存耗尽的拒绝服务攻击。请在 ApolloServer 构造函数中设置 `cache: \"bounded\"` 或 `persistedQueries: false`，或参阅 https://go.apollo.dev/s/cache-backends 了解其他替代方案。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: You have specified an Apollo key but have not specified a graph ref; usage reporting is disabled. To enable usage reporting, set the `APOLLO_GRAPH_REF` environment variable to `your-graph-id@your-graph-variant`. To disable this warning, install `ApolloServerPluginUsageReportingDisabled`.
ast.target: 您已指定 Apollo 密钥但未指定图引用；使用情况报告已禁用。要启用使用情况报告，请将 `APOLLO_GRAPH_REF` 环境变量设置为 `your-graph-id@your-graph-variant`。要禁用此警告，请安装 `ApolloServerPluginUsageReportingDisabled`。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: isNexusTypeDef is deprecated, use isNexusStruct
ast.target: isNexusTypeDef 已弃用，请使用 isNexusStruct

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The GraphQL Nexus "authorize" feature has been moved to a plugin, add [fieldAuthorizePlugin()] to your makeSchema plugin config to remove this warning.
ast.target: GraphQL Nexus 的 \"authorize\" 功能已移至插件，请将 [fieldAuthorizePlugin()] 添加到您的 makeSchema 插件配置中以移除此警告。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Unknown kind of type def to build. It will be ignored. The type def was: %j
ast.target: 未知的类型定义种类。它将被忽略。类型定义为：%j

ast.name: warn
ast.source: It looks like you provided a `prettierConfig` option to GraphQL Nexus, but you do not have prettier installed as a dependency in your project. Please add it as a peerDependency of nexus to use this feature. Skipping formatting.
ast.target: 看起来您向 GraphQL Nexus 提供了 `prettierConfig` 选项，但您的项目中没有将 prettier 安装为依赖项。请将其添加为 nexus 的 peerDependency 以使用此功能。跳过格式化。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: You should specify a configuration value for outputs in Nexus' makeSchema. Provide one to remove this warning.
ast.target: 您应该为 Nexus 的 makeSchema 中的 outputs 指定一个配置值。提供一个以移除此警告。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The `Int` scalar type represents non-fractional signed whole numeric values. Int can represent values between -(2^31) and 2^31 - 1.
ast.target: `Int` 标量类型表示非分数的有符号整数值。Int 可以表示 -(2^31) 到 2^31 - 1 之间的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The `Float` scalar type represents signed double-precision fractional values as specified by [IEEE 754](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/IEEE_floating_point).
ast.target: `Float` 标量类型表示有符号的双精度分数值，如 [IEEE 754](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/IEEE_floating_point) 所规定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The `String` scalar type represents textual data, represented as UTF-8 character sequences. The String type is most often used by GraphQL to represent free-form human-readable text.
ast.target: `String` 标量类型表示文本数据，表示为 UTF-8 字符序列。String 类型最常被 GraphQL 用于表示自由格式的人类可读文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The `Boolean` scalar type represents `true` or `false`.
ast.target: `Boolean` 标量类型表示 `true` 或 `false`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Directs the executor to include this field or fragment only when the `if` argument is true.
ast.target: 指示执行器仅在 `if` 参数为 true 时包含此字段或片段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Included when true.
ast.target: 当为 true 时包含。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Directs the executor to skip this field or fragment when the `if` argument is true.
ast.target: 指示执行器在 `if` 参数为 true 时跳过此字段或片段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Skipped when true.
ast.target: 当为 true 时跳过。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Marks an element of a GraphQL schema as no longer supported.
ast.target: 将 GraphQL 模式中的某个元素标记为不再支持。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Explains why this element was deprecated, usually also including a suggestion for how to access supported similar data. Formatted using the Markdown syntax, as specified by [CommonMark](https://commonmark.org/).
ast.target: 解释此元素被弃用的原因，通常也包括如何访问受支持的类似数据的建议。使用 Markdown 语法格式化，如 [CommonMark](https://commonmark.org/) 所规定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Exposes a URL that specifies the behavior of this scalar.
ast.target: 暴露一个指定此标量行为的 URL。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The URL that specifies the behavior of this scalar.
ast.target: 指定此标量行为的 URL。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A GraphQL Schema defines the capabilities of a GraphQL server. It exposes all available types and directives on the server, as well as the entry points for query, mutation, and subscription operations.
ast.target: GraphQL 模式定义了 GraphQL 服务器的功能。它暴露了服务器上所有可用的类型和指令，以及查询、变更和订阅操作的入口点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A list of all types supported by this server.
ast.target: 此服务器支持的所有类型列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The type that query operations will be rooted at.
ast.target: 查询操作将以此类型为根。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If this server supports mutation, the type that mutation operations will be rooted at.
ast.target: 如果此服务器支持变更，则变更操作将以此类型为根。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If this server support subscription, the type that subscription operations will be rooted at.
ast.target: 如果此服务器支持订阅，则订阅操作将以此类型为根。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A list of all directives supported by this server.
ast.target: 此服务器支持的所有指令列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A Directive can be adjacent to many parts of the GraphQL language, a __DirectiveLocation describes one such possible adjacencies.
ast.target: 指令可以与 GraphQL 语言的许多部分相邻，`__DirectiveLocation` 描述了其中一种可能的相邻位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Location adjacent to a query operation.
ast.target: 与查询操作相邻的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Location adjacent to a mutation operation.
ast.target: 与变更操作相邻的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Location adjacent to a subscription operation.
ast.target: 与订阅操作相邻的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Location adjacent to a field.
ast.target: 与字段相邻的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Location adjacent to a fragment definition.
ast.target: 与片段定义相邻的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Location adjacent to a fragment spread.
ast.target: 与片段展开相邻的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Location adjacent to an inline fragment.
ast.target: 与内联片段相邻的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Location adjacent to a variable definition.
ast.target: 与变量定义相邻的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Location adjacent to a schema definition.
ast.target: 与模式定义相邻的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Location adjacent to a scalar definition.
ast.target: 与标量定义相邻的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Location adjacent to an object type definition.
ast.target: 与对象类型定义相邻的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Location adjacent to a field definition.
ast.target: 与字段定义相邻的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Location adjacent to an argument definition.
ast.target: 与参数定义相邻的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Location adjacent to an interface definition.
ast.target: 与接口定义相邻的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Location adjacent to a union definition.
ast.target: 与联合类型定义相邻的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Location adjacent to an enum definition.
ast.target: 与枚举定义相邻的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Location adjacent to an enum value definition.
ast.target: 与枚举值定义相邻的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Location adjacent to an input object type definition.
ast.target: 与输入对象类型定义相邻的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Location adjacent to an input object field definition.
ast.target: 与输入对象字段定义相邻的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Object and Interface types are described by a list of Fields, each of which has a name, potentially a list of arguments, and a return type.
ast.target: 对象和接口类型由字段列表描述，每个字段都有一个名称，可能还有一个参数列表，以及一个返回类型。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Arguments provided to Fields or Directives and the input fields of an InputObject are represented as Input Values which describe their type and optionally a default value.
ast.target: 提供给字段或指令的参数以及输入对象的输入字段被表示为输入值，这些值描述了它们的类型以及可选的默认值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A GraphQL-formatted string representing the default value for this input value.
ast.target: 一个 GraphQL 格式的字符串，表示此输入值的默认值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One possible value for a given Enum. Enum values are unique values, not a placeholder for a string or numeric value. However an Enum value is returned in a JSON response as a string.
ast.target: 给定枚举的一个可能值。枚举值是唯一的值，不是字符串或数字值的占位符。然而，枚举值在 JSON 响应中作为字符串返回。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An enum describing what kind of type a given `__Type` is.
ast.target: 一个枚举，描述给定 `__Type` 是哪种类型。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates this type is a scalar.
ast.target: 表示此类型是标量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates this type is an object. `fields` and `interfaces` are valid fields.
ast.target: 表示此类型是对象。`fields` 和 `interfaces` 是有效的字段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates this type is an interface. `fields`, `interfaces`, and `possibleTypes` are valid fields.
ast.target: 表示此类型是接口。`fields`、`interfaces` 和 `possibleTypes` 是有效的字段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates this type is a union. `possibleTypes` is a valid field.
ast.target: 表示此类型是联合类型。`possibleTypes` 是有效的字段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates this type is an enum. `enumValues` is a valid field.
ast.target: 表示此类型是枚举。`enumValues` 是有效的字段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates this type is an input object. `inputFields` is a valid field.
ast.target: 表示此类型是输入对象。`inputFields` 是有效的字段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates this type is a list. `ofType` is a valid field.
ast.target: 表示此类型是列表。`ofType` 是有效的字段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates this type is a non-null. `ofType` is a valid field.
ast.target: 表示此类型是非空。`ofType` 是有效的字段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Access the current type schema of this server.
ast.target: 访问此服务器的当前类型模式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Request the type information of a single type.
ast.target: 请求单个类型的类型信息。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The name of the current Object type at runtime.
ast.target: 运行时当前对象类型的名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Directs the executor to defer this fragment when the `if` argument is true or undefined.
ast.target: 指示执行器在 `if` 参数为 true 或未定义时延迟此片段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Deferred when true or undefined.
ast.target: 当为 true 或未定义时延迟。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unique name
ast.target: 唯一名称

ast.name: description
ast.source: Directs the executor to stream plural fields when the `if` argument is true or undefined.
ast.target: 指示执行器在 `if` 参数为 true 或未定义时流式传输复数字段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Stream when true or undefined.
ast.target: 当为 true 或未定义时流式传输。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of items to return immediately
ast.target: 立即返回的项目数量

ast.name: description
ast.source: Core engine for Apollo GraphQL server
ast.target: Apollo GraphQL 服务器的核心引擎

ast.name: description
ast.source: Scalable, strongly typed GraphQL schema development
ast.target: 可扩展、强类型的 GraphQL 模式开发

ast.name: description
ast.source:
This scalar should never make it into production. It is used as a placeholder for situations
    where GraphQL Nexus encounters a missing type. We don't want to error immediately, otherwise
    the TypeScript definitions will not be updated.
ast.target: \n    此标量绝不应进入生产环境。它用作占位符，用于 GraphQL Nexus 遇到缺失类型的情况。我们不希望立即报错，否则 TypeScript 定义将不会更新。\n

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns the first n elements from the list.
ast.target: 从列表中返回前 n 个元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns the elements in the list that come after the specified cursor
ast.target: 返回列表中在指定游标之后的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns the last n elements from the list.
ast.target: 从列表中返回后 n 个元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns the elements in the list that come before the specified cursor
ast.target: 返回列表中在指定游标之前的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: PageInfo cursor, as defined in https://facebook.github.io/relay/graphql/connections.htm#sec-undefined.PageInfo
ast.target: PageInfo 游标，如 https://facebook.github.io/relay/graphql/connections.htm#sec-undefined.PageInfo 中所定义。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Used to indicate whether more edges exist following the set defined by the clients arguments.
ast.target: 用于指示在客户端参数定义的集合之后是否还存在更多边。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Used to indicate whether more edges exist prior to the set defined by the clients arguments.
ast.target: 用于指示在客户端参数定义的集合之前是否还存在更多边。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The cursor corresponding to the first nodes in edges. Null if the connection is empty.
ast.target: 对应于边中第一个节点的游标。如果连接为空，则为 Null。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The cursor corresponding to the last nodes in edges. Null if the connection is empty.
ast.target: 对应于边中最后一个节点的游标。如果连接为空，则为 Null。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The authorize plugin provides field-level authorization for a schema.
ast.target: 授权插件为模式提供字段级授权。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The nullability guard can be helpful, but is also a potentially expensive operation for lists.
    We need to iterate the entire list to check for null items to guard against. Set this to true
    to skip the null guard on a specific field if you know there's no potential for unsafe types.
ast.target: \n    空值守卫可能很有帮助，但对于列表来说也可能是一个潜在昂贵的操作。我们需要遍历整个列表以检查空项进行防护。如果您知道特定字段没有不安全类型的可能，请将其设置为 true 以跳过该字段的空值守卫。\n

ast.name: description
ast.source: If we have a nullable field, we want to guard against this being an issue in production.
ast.target: 如果我们有一个可空字段，我们希望防止这在生产中成为问题。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The complexity for an individual field. Return a number
    or a function that returns a number to specify the
    complexity for this field.
ast.target: \n    单个字段的复杂度。返回一个数字或一个返回数字的函数来指定此字段的复杂度。\n

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The query complexity plugin allows defining field-level complexity values that
      works with the graphql-query-complexity library.
ast.target: \n      查询复杂度插件允许定义字段级复杂度值，与 graphql-query-complexity 库配合使用。\n

ast.name: description
description
description
ast.source: Provides a declarative nullable/list API, available by default pre-0.19
ast.target: 提供声明式的可空/列表 API，在 0.19 版本之前默认可用。

ast.target: 新文件夹的保险库绝对路径。
